hero.title: Protecting Canadian
hero.body: ElevateIP is a national program empowering Canada's most promising startups with expert intellectual property guidance delivered through a network of trusted regional accelerators and incubators.

valueProps.heading: Where IP Strategy Meets Startup Growth
valueProps.body: ElevateIP, with the support of {ised}, works with Business Accelerators and Incubators (BAIs) across Canada to deliver professional, stage-appropriate IP services to the startups they support.

values.title: IP Strategy First
values.body: We help Canadian startups understand, develop, and protect their most valuable assets: their ideas.

values.title: Growth-Stage Ready
values.body: From seed to scale, our programs align IP strategy with your funding and commercialization milestones.

values.title: Nationwide Coverage
values.body: A unified network of regional BAIs spans every province and territory, so every founder has a local expert.

regionalRouter.heading: Your Regional IP Partner Is Waiting
regionalRouter.body: Select your province or territory below to be connected with your dedicated regional program and local IP specialists.

resources.heading: Nationally Available Tools & Events
resources.body: No matter where you are in Canada, these resources are available to every founder in the ElevateIP ecosystem.

items.title: IP Fundamentals for Startups
items.desc: An introduction to patents, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright for early-stage companies.

items.title: IP Audit Checklist
items.desc: A self-assessment tool to identify gaps in your current IP protection strategy.

items.title: National IP Webinar Series
items.desc: Monthly live sessions with IP professionals covering commercialization, licensing, and enforcement.

items.title: Service Provider Directory
items.desc: Connect with an IP advisor from our national network tailored to your sector and stage.

facts.text: Canadian SMEs holding registered IP rights are

footer.disclaimer: Elevate IP is a federally funded, national project to help business accelerators and incubators (BAIs) provide the tools Canadian startups need to understand, strategically manage and leverage their intellectual property.

experts.heading: National IP Experts
experts.subheading: Vetted intellectual property professionals connected through the ElevateIP national network. Find the right expert for your stage and region.
experts.searchPlaceholder: Search by firm name, specialty, or city…
experts.noExpertsBody: No firms match your current filters. Try adjusting your search or broadening your criteria.

intake.heading: National Service Provider Intake
intake.body: A centralized intake form for IP professionals and service providers to join the national ElevateIP network is currently in development.

expertProfile.contactPrompt: Interested in working with this firm? Reach out directly.

partners.heading: Ecosystem Partners
partners.body: Connecting Canadian startups with the national network of intellectual property support organizations.

atlantic.label: Atlantic Canada
atlantic.tagline: Supporting innovation across the Atlantic provinces.

quebec.label: Quebec
quebec.tagline: Guiding Québec startups through their IP journey.

ontario.label: Ontario & Prairies
ontario.tagline: Serving Ontario, Manitoba, Ottawa, and Saskatchewan.

alberta.label: Alberta
alberta.tagline: Accelerating IP strategy for Alberta's startup ecosystem.

bc.label: BC & Territories
bc.tagline: Serving BC, Yukon, Nunavut, and the Northwest Territories.

eventCalendar.heading: Upcoming IP Events
eventCalendar.body: Workshops, webinars, and clinics from Canada's ElevateIP partner network — approved and curated for startup founders.
eventCalendar.submitCta: Are you an ElevateIP Partner? Submit an event here
eventCalendar.noEventsBody: There are no approved events scheduled right now. Check back soon, or submit yours above.

submitEventModal.title: Submit an Event

title_fr.label: Event Title (French)
title_fr.placeholder: e.g. Atelier sur les fondamentaux de la PI

submitEventModal.successBody: Your event has been received and is pending review. We'll approve it shortly.
submitEventModal.disclaimer: Submitted events are reviewed before appearing on the calendar.
